one_line_summary: The agent built a strong skeleton with good tests and CLI wiring, but left test execution mocked out in production code, rendering it unusable.
strengths: Wrote a high-quality ADR before beginning implementation.
Successfully integrated the new feature deeply into the CLI parser, REPL, and PlanMode factory.
Wrote comprehensive unit tests covering all phase transitions, error handling, and retries.
weaknesses: Hardcoded a mock `_run_test()` method returning fake test failures in production code instead of using `BashTool`.
Failed to create the Wiki documentation page due to hallucinating the tool call syntax.
The hardcoded test output causes the GREEN phase to always abort in a real session.
